Title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
Writer: Jane Goldman, Matthew Vaughn, Mark Millar
Actors: Taron Egerton, Colin Firth, Mark Strong
Plot: After the Kingsman headquarters are blown up by a psychotic criminal named Poppy Adams (Julianne Moore), the surviving agents find their way to an allied secret organization based in Kentucky, named "Statesman". The two agencies must now work together in order to save the world and take down the so called "Golden Circle".
